title: Marketing Communications Executive (Central)
description:
📍 Location: Central Singapore
💰 Up to $4,000/month 
🗓 5 days work week (8.30am - 5.30pm)

Our client is Singapore’s most prestigious and well-established golf and lifestyle community, they offer world-class facilities, a storied heritage, and a deep sense of camaraderie among their members creating a rewarding environment for those looking to build a career in the leisure and hospitality sector.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Execute integrated marketing and communications plans, coordinating timelines, assets, approvals, and reporting on campaign performance.

  • Develop, edit, and proof high-quality content for marketing materials, publications, digital platforms, media outreach, and internal communications.

  • Manage editorial calendars, copy flow, production processes, and uphold brand guidelines while maintaining a central asset library.

  • Support sponsorship and advertising initiatives, including inventory tracking, entitlements, and presentation materials.

  • Assist with event planning and on-site execution, creating event communications and gathering feedback to improve future activities.

  • Maintain and update website, social media, and mobile app content, partnering with IT on minor enhancements.

  • Contribute to CSR and sustainability communications.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing or a related field.

  • Strong marketing, branding, and content development skills across digital and traditional platforms.

  • Capable of coordinating campaigns, timelines, and stakeholders with strong attention to detail.

  • Able to use digital tools, track performance metrics, and produce basic reports; design skills are advantageous.

  • Proactive, adaptable, and communicative, with willingness to support events or tasks outside regular hours.

To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



SAAY

EA Registration No.: R25139436

EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
